title: Real-time Feedback (v1)
description: A real-time feedback record with a single sender and single recipient.

uuid.description: A unique identifier associated with this feedback.

sender.description: The employee who gave the feedback.

recipient.description: The employee who received the feedback.

content.description: The publicly visible content of the feedback.

created_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the feedback was created and sent.
